title: Richiman & Groove Nice
description: South Korean blues band Richiman & Groove Nice (@rngn_official) presents attractive performances with solid grooves and authentic blues sounds. They made it to the Top 5 at the 2022 International Blues Challenge, spearheading a new wave of Korean blues. With their album 'Pack My Suitcase' recorded in Memphis and LA, they are a band touring globally. They deliver blues that connects tradition and modernity with powerful energy, soulful emotion, and and strong musicality.
